Operation 'getAccountV4' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too brief and uses 'search' terminology inconsistent with GET operation semantics. Enhanced description specifies what is returned and clarifies the required parameter for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Retrieves an account in Pleo by its ID.
data.current_description: Search for a specific account by its account ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific account from Pleo by its account ID. Returns the complete account details including name, code, external ID, company ID, and archived status. Requires a valid accountId parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too brief and uses 'search' terminology inconsistent with GET operation semantics. Enhanced description specifies what is returned and clarifies the required parameter for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateAccountV4' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is too generic. Description mentions archiving but doesn't clarify that this is the mechanism for handling accounts with accounting entries (vs. deletion). Enhanced summary and description clarify the operation's dual purpose, support for partial updates, and return value for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update details of an existing account in Pleo. The integration must send a request to this endpoint when it is trying to archive an account linked to accounting entries.
data.summary_suggestion: Update account details or archive status.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing account in Pleo, including account details and archived status. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Commonly used to archive accounts linked to accounting entries. Returns the updated account object. Requires a valid accountId parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description mentions archiving but doesn't clarify that this is the mechanism for handling accounts with accounting entries (vs. deletion). Enhanced summary and description clarify the operation's dual purpose, support for partial updates, and return value for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteAccountV4' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate. Description is clear about constraints but could better emphasize the irreversible nature and provide clearer guidance on the alternative (archiving via UPDATE). Enhanced description adds emphasis on permanence and clarifies the decision logic for AI agents choosing between delete and archive operations.

data.current_description:
Deletes an existing account in Pleo.

Only accounts not linked to any accounting entries can be deleted. Trying to delete an account linked to accounting entries will result in an error. If an account is linked, it can be archived instead. Use UPDATE endpoint to archive an account.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an account from Pleo. Only accounts not linked to any accounting entries can be deleted. Attempting to delete an account with accounting entries will fail with an error - use the UPDATE endpoint to archive such accounts instead. Requires a valid accountId parameter. This operation is irreversible.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description is clear about constraints but could better emphasize the irreversible nature and provide clearer guidance on the alternative (archiving via UPDATE). Enhanced description adds emphasis on permanence and clarifies the decision logic for AI agents choosing between delete and archive operations.

message: Operation 'searchAccountsV4' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary 'Fetch a list' is generic and doesn't convey the search/filter capability. Description mentions filters but lacks detail on pagination mechanism and clarification that filters are optional. Enhanced summary emphasizes search capability, and description specifies cursor-based pagination, clarifies optional filter behavior, and explains return structure for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of accounts with optional filters for companyId, ids, name, code and archived status. Results are paginated.
data.summary_suggestion: Search and retrieve accounts with filters.
data.description_suggestion: Searches and retrieves a paginated list of accounts from Pleo with optional filtering by companyId, account IDs, name, code, and archived status. Supports cursor-based pagination for efficient result navigation. Returns account objects matching the specified criteria. Filters are optional - omitting filters returns all accessible accounts.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Fetch a list' is generic and doesn't convey the search/filter capability. Description mentions filters but lacks detail on pagination mechanism and clarification that filters are optional. Enhanced summary emphasizes search capability, and description specifies cursor-based pagination, clarifies optional filter behavior, and explains return structure for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
